seoTitle: How to Create and Embed Forms in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to build a custom form in GoHighLevel, style it, and embed it on your website or funnel to start collecting leads without writing any code.
intro: GoHighLevel's form builder lets you collect leads, inquiries, appointments, and survey responses directly through your website without touching code. This guide covers building a form, styling it, and placing it live on a page or funnel.

steps.heading: Create a new form
steps.body: Start a new form inside GoHighLevel and give it a name that reflects its purpose, whether that's lead capture, an appointment request, or a survey.

steps.heading: Add and configure fields
steps.body: Add the fields you need, such as name, email, or phone number, and set which ones are required so you collect exactly the information your workflow depends on.

steps.heading: Customize the design
steps.body: Adjust the form's look and feel to match your branding, then review the form settings to control behavior like confirmation messages.

steps.heading: Generate the embed code
steps.body: Once the form is ready, generate its embed code so it can be placed on any page you control, whether that's a website, landing page, or funnel.

steps.heading: Embed the form and test it
steps.body: Paste the embed code into your site or funnel builder, then submit a test entry to confirm the form works and captures data correctly.

steps.heading: Connect it to workflows and automations
steps.body: Link the form to workflows, calendars, email notifications, or AI-powered automations so new submissions trigger the right follow-up automatically.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to embed a GoHighLevel form?
faq.answer: No, GoHighLevel generates the embed code for you, so you just need to paste it into your website, landing page, or funnel builder.

faq.question: Can a form trigger an automated workflow?
faq.answer: Yes, forms can be connected to workflows so a new submission automatically adds a contact, sends a notification, or kicks off a follow-up sequence.

faq.question: How do I improve form conversion rates?
faq.answer: Keeping the field count low and matching the design to your page's branding are two of the most effective ways to increase completions.

faq.question: Can I embed the same form on multiple pages?
faq.answer: Yes, the same embed code can be placed on as many pages as you want, and all submissions will still funnel into the same GoHighLevel account.
